Name: deleteUsers
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (DELETE FROM "auth"."users" WHERE users."id" = $1::uuid RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."display_name" AS "displayName" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
